title: Roblox introduces ‘Kids’ and ‘Select’ accounts for age-appropriate access to games and chat
summary: Roblox is introducing age-appropriate account types with 'Kids' accounts for ages 5-9 and 'Select' accounts for ages 9-15, each with different levels of access and protections. The move reflects the company's response to intense scrutiny over child safety issues and multiple state lawsuits. The tiered approach enables Roblox to provide safer experiences tailored to different age groups on the platform.
content: Users aged five to nine will be assigned to a "Roblox Kids" account, and users aged nine to 15 to will be put in a "Roblox Select" account.

zh.title: Roblox推出"儿童"和"精选"账户，为不同年龄提供适龄游戏和聊天体验
zh.summary: Roblox推出适龄账户类型，其中"儿童"账户面向5-9岁用户，"精选"账户面向9-15岁用户，各具不同的访问级别和保护措施。此举反映了该公司对儿童安全问题和多起州诉讼的回应。这种分级方案使Roblox能够为平台上的不同年龄组提供量身定制的更安全体验。

title: Roblox will need age verification to make sure you’re at least 9 years old
summary: Roblox is implementing age verification requirements for users wanting to access games designed for ages 9 and older as part of its rollout of Kids and Select accounts. The platform has faced intense scrutiny and multiple state lawsuits over child safety concerns, prompting several protective measures. The verification process is among features Roblox has introduced to enhance protections for younger users.
content:
Roblox is about to make a big change to how you can access games on its platform: If you want to play any game that's intended for users nine or older, you will have to complete an age verification process. The shift is happening as part of a rollout of new Roblox Kids and Roblox Select accounts, which have different levels of protections for kids of different age groups.
Roblox has come under intense scrutiny over alleged child safety issues on the platform, and the company is the subject of multiple state lawsuits. The platform has introduced many features to attempt to make the platform a safer place for kids, including locking down sexu …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Roblox将实施年龄验证以确保用户至少9岁
zh.summary: 作为儿童和精选账户推出计划的一部分，Roblox正在对希望访问为9岁及以上用户设计的游戏的用户实施年龄验证要求。该平台因儿童安全问题面临严格审查和多起州诉讼，促使公司采取多项保护措施。年龄验证是Roblox为加强对年轻用户保护而推出的功能之一。

title: Roblox has games again
summary: Roblox has reversed its 2021 decision to replace the word 'games' with 'experiences' across its platform, returning to the more intuitive terminology. The company found that 'experiences' confused many parents, players, and developers about what Roblox actually offers. The shift marks a practical acknowledgment that clearer language better serves its user base and reflects the platform's actual function.
content:
Roblox is making a subtle but notable change. After swapping the word "game" for "experience" all over its website and mobile apps in 2021 while the Epic Games v. Apple trial was taking place, Roblox is getting more comfortable with using the term "games" once again.
"Over time, we've learned that 'experiences' isn't an intuitive term for many parents, older players, and game developers," Roblox spokesperson Juliet Chaitin-Lefcourt tells The Verge. "'Games' is clearer and better reflects what Roblox is and where we're going."
One of the Epic v. Apple trial's major points was trying to define what a game is. Roblox sits in a bit of a middle …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Roblox再次使用"游戏"一词
zh.summary: Roblox撤销了2021年的决定，当时曾在整个平台上将"游戏"一词替换为"体验"。该公司发现"体验"一词使许多家长、玩家和开发者对Roblox的实际功能感到困惑。这一转变实际上承认了更清晰的语言能更好地服务其用户群体，并准确反映了平台的真实功能。

title: Did Neuralink make the wrong bet?
summary: Neuralink's brain implant technology faces the challenge of translating ambitious visions of superhuman abilities and mind-AI integration into practical reality. Despite some success with human trials, current products remain limited to brain-to-cursor interfaces for mouse control, far short of Musk's promises. The gap between Musk's claims and scientific progress highlights how hype is colliding with technological constraints.
content:
Elon Musk promised Neuralink would bring superhuman abilities and minds merged with AI. Then he fueled a runaway hype train for his brain implant technology, which ended up with a grisly record for implants in monkeys and some success with human subjects. But for all of the hype, he's still further away than Mars from his goal. And that's because his relentless ambition is once again hitting the wall of scientific reality.
The heart of the issue is how brain-computer interfaces (BCIs) translate thought into results. Neuralink's products have all been brain-to-cursor interfaces, which allow patients to control a mouse with their minds. But N …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Neuralink做了错误的赌注吗？
zh.summary: Neuralink的脑植入技术面临将超人类能力和意识-AI整合的宏大愿景转化为实际现实的挑战。尽管在人体试验中取得了一些成功，但目前的产品仍然局限于脑-光标界面以实现鼠标控制，远未达到马斯克的承诺。马斯克的声称与科学进步之间的差距凸显了炒作与技术限制的碰撞。

title: Microsoft’s new Xbox Gamepad Cursor adds a virtual mouse to handhelds
summary: Microsoft is testing a virtual mouse cursor feature for Windows-based handhelds that converts a gamepad's left stick into a mouse for applications not optimized for controller input. The Gamepad Cursor integrates directly into Windows 11's Xbox mode and can be activated from the Game Bar without third-party software. The feature addresses a practical need for handheld gamers requiring precise cursor control.
content:
Microsoft has started testing its own virtual mouse cursor inside its Xbox mode for Windows-based handhelds. The new Gamepad Cursor option provides a quick way to turn the left stick of a handheld like the Xbox Ally X into a virtual mouse.
While Asus has its own cursor as part of Armory Crate, Microsoft's Gamepad Cursor lives inside its own Xbox mode in Windows 11, and it's easy to activate from the Game Bar without having to use Armory Crate. Once activated, the Gamepad Cursor will turn your left stick into a mouse for precise control, or for apps that aren't designed for controllers.
The left stick will scroll around a screen like a mous …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软新推出的Xbox游戏手柄光标为手持设备添加虚拟鼠标
zh.summary: 微软正在测试一项虚拟鼠标光标功能，为基于Windows的手持设备提供支持，该功能将游戏手柄的左摇杆转换为鼠标，用于未针对控制器输入优化的应用程序。游戏手柄光标直接集成到Windows 11的Xbox模式中，可以从Game Bar激活，无需第三方软件。该功能解决了需要精确光标控制的手持游戏玩家的实际需求。

title: Sam Altman reportedly targeted in second attack
summary: Sam Altman was targeted in a second attack on his Russian Hill home on Sunday morning, with two suspects arrested and charged with negligent discharge following a shooting incident. This follows an earlier Friday attack when a 20-year-old was arrested for allegedly throwing a Molotov cocktail at the same property. Both incidents remain under investigation by San Francisco Police.
content:
Sam Altman was seemingly targeted by a second attack on Sunday morning, with two suspects arrested following a shooting at his Russian Hill residence, The San Francisco Standard reports. The suspects were arrested and charged with negligent discharge, according to a police report on the incident, citing surveillance footage that appears to show a vehicle passenger firing a weapon at Altman's home.
This follows an earlier attack on Friday, in which a 20-year-old man was arrested for allegedly throwing a Molotov cocktail at the same property. The investigations for both incidents are still ongoing.
According to San Francisco Police, offers w …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 据报道Sam Altman成为第二次袭击的目标
zh.summary: 周日上午，Sam Altman在其俄罗斯山庄家中遭到第二次袭击，两名嫌疑人因射击事件中的过失伤害被逮捕并指控。这次袭击紧随周五的早期袭击，当时一名20岁的男子因涉嫌向同一处房产投掷汽油弹而被逮捕。两起事件均在旧金山警察局的调查中。

title: Huawei beats Apple and Samsung with new wide foldable
summary: Huawei has unveiled the Pura X Max, a wide-aspect ratio foldable phone launching in China, beating Apple and Samsung to market with this form factor. The device features a passport-like design matching leaked iPhone Fold concepts and includes a triple rear camera system in multiple colors. Full specifications will be announced on April 20th alongside the Pura 90 series.
content:
The Pura X Max’s wide aspect ratio should make it a better option for watching horizontal video. | Image: Huawei	

Apple and Samsung have both been strongly linked with plans for foldable phones in a boxy, wide aspect ratio, but it looks like another company will get there first. Huawei has just revealed the design of the Pura X Max, a new foldable it's launching in China next week, and its passport-esque form factor is a dead ringer for early leaks of the iPhone Fold.
We don't know too much about the Pura X Max yet, which will get a full release on April 20th alongside the colorful Pura 90 series, but early images shared by Huawei show blue, white, orange, and black versions of the phone, all featuring a triple rear camera. The rear design, with gridde …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 华为推出新款宽屏折叠手机，领先苹果和三星
zh.summary: 华为推出Pura X Max，一款宽屏幅比例的折叠手机，将在中国推出，抢先苹果和三星推出这种形式的手机。该设备采用护照式设计，与泄露的iPhone Fold概念相符，配备三摄像头系统，提供多种颜色选择。完整规格将于4月20日与Pura 90系列一起公布。

title: The largest orbital compute cluster is open for business
summary: Kepler Communications has launched the largest orbital compute cluster, deploying 40 GPUs in Earth orbit with Sophia Space as its first customer. The development represents a significant milestone toward practical distributed computing capabilities in space. The orbital infrastructure opens new possibilities for satellite-based computational services and applications.
content: Kepler Communications is flying 40 GPUs in Earth orbit. And its latest customer is Sophia Space.

zh.title: 最大的轨道计算集群已投入运营
zh.summary: Kepler Communications推出了最大的轨道计算集群，在地球轨道上部署了40个GPU，Sophia Space成为其首个客户。这一发展代表了朝着实现空间分布式计算能力的重要里程碑。该轨道基础设施为基于卫星的计算服务和应用开辟了新的可能性。
